title: EaseonSS - SafeBlocks
description: Prevents mobs from picking up blocks and explosions from destroying blocks. Entity damage remains unaffected.
body:
# 🌿 Easeon – SafeBlocks **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview **SafeBlocks** is a lightweight Fabric mod that prevents mob-related block griefing. Stops mobs from picking up blocks and explosions from destroying blocks while keeping all combat mechanics intact. Perfect for maintaining your builds without sacrificing gameplay challenge. ## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | ----------------------------- | -------------------- | | /easeon safeblocks | View current status | | /easeon safeblocks | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.safeblocks.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
